category_sources: source_facts.description says lld is the LLVM Project Linker.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is lld; source_facts.homepage is the official lld.llvm.org site.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official LLVM lld documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies LLVM Project Linker; source_facts.executables lists linker tools such as ld.lld, lld-link, and wasm-ld.
